entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange platform operating the HollaEx Pro trading venue and publishing an open-source exchange stack with spot order books, market data, wallet and account functions, deposits and withdrawals, conversions, and public and authenticated APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party HollaEx pages expose the HollaEx Pro exchange and the HollaEx Kit exchange stack. Current first-party API documentation covers public ticker, order-book, trade, chart, and exchange-information endpoints together with authenticated balance, deposit, withdrawal, order, and conversion functions. No exact launch date or operating jurisdiction is asserted in this growth record.

evidence.title: HollaEx official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party site identifies HollaEx as an exchange platform, exposes the HollaEx Pro trading venue, and documents its exchange kit, matching engine, operator controls, wallet and market infrastructure, and developer resources.

evidence.title: HollaEx API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API reference documents public exchange information, tickers, order books, trades and charts plus authenticated balances, deposits, withdrawals, orders, conversions, WebSocket feeds, and administrative exchange interfaces.
